notes:
- The app now needs a one-time unlock key from the developer. Enter it once and this computer stays unlocked for good - updates and going offline won't ask again.
- Brand-new Theme Studio: recolour the whole app from a live mini preview. Click any card or button to edit it, drag colour / vibrance / brightness sliders, edit borders on their own, and watch it all update live before you commit.
- Built-in theme presets (Deep Ocean, Synthwave, Emerald City, Frostbyte and more) - one click to apply, then tweak to taste.
- Save your own presets and re-apply them anytime.
- Undo/redo while theming (Ctrl+Z / Ctrl+Y).
- ...and a ridiculous live-rainbow RGB theme, because why not.

App-only update: no "Update Bridge Payload" step.
